title: How is monday.com responding to the ongoing COVID-19 crisis in India?
excerpt: monday.com is giving nonprofits free access and support to the tools they need to respond to the devastating pandemic in India.Any nonprofit responding to the Covid-19 crisis in India may apply for a 1-year free license …

posts.author: lrosalanko (Lauren Rosalanko)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday.com is giving nonprofits free access and support to the tools they need to respond to the devastating pandemic in India.Any nonprofit responding to the Covid-19 crisis in India may apply for a 1-year free license for monday.com work OS.
monday.com will also provide you with setup support to get you up and running as fast as possible.* Nonprofits do not have to be physically located in India to be eligible.Please go to this link to find out if your organisation is eligible.
https://monday.com/lp/india-covid.
